config.arch_notes: MRI+Clinical fusion: ResNet+SE (1→16→32→64→128) + ClinicalEncoder MLP(5→64→128). Concat(256)→Linear(5). 150 epochs each, ensemble=2. CosineAnnealingLR T_max=150. DROPOUT=0.5. WD=0.05. H+V flip. Standard CE. TTA=8 passes. LR=5e-4. Clinical z-score normalization (train-set mean/std).

MRI+Clinical fusion: ResNet+SE (1→16→32→64→128) + ClinicalEncoder MLP(5→64→128). Concat(256)→Linear(5). 150 epochs each, ensemble=2. CosineAnnealingLR T_max=150. DROPOUT=0.5. WD=0.05. H+V flip. Standard CE. TTA=8 passes. LR=5e-4. Clinical z-score normalization (train-set mean/std).

MRI+Clinical fusion: ResNet+SE (1→16→32→64→128) + ClinicalEncoder MLP(5→64→128). Concat(256)→Linear(5). 150 epochs each, ensemble=2. CosineAnnealingLR T_max=150. DROPOUT=0.5. WD=0.05. H+V flip. Standard CE. TTA=8 passes. LR=5e-4. Clinical z-score normalization (train-set mean/std).

MRI+Clinical fusion: ResNet+SE (1→16→32→64→128) + ClinicalEncoder MLP(7→64→128). Concat(256)→Linear(5). 150 epochs each, ensemble=2. CosineAnnealingLR T_max=150. DROPOUT=0.5. WD=0.05. H+V flip. Standard CE. TTA=8 passes. LR=5e-4. Clinical z-score normalization. Derived features: BMI=W/H^2, SV=EDV-ESV.

MRI+Clinical fusion: ResNet+SE (1→16→32→64→128) + ClinicalEncoder MLP(7→64→128). Concat(256)→Linear(5). 150 epochs each, ensemble=2. CosineAnnealingLR T_max=150. DROPOUT=0.5. WD=0.05. H+V flip. Standard CE. TTA=8 passes. LR=5e-4. Clinical z-score normalization. Derived features: BMI=W/H^2, SV=EDV-ESV.

MRI+Clinical fusion: ResNet+SE (1→16→32→64→128) + ClinicalEncoder MLP(7→64→128). Concat(256)→Linear(5). 150 epochs each, ensemble=2. CosineAnnealingLR T_max=150. DROPOUT=0.5. WD=0.05. H+V flip. Standard CE. TTA=8 passes. LR=5e-4. Clinical z-score normalization. Derived features: BMI=W/H^2, SV=EDV-ESV.

MRI+Clinical fusion: ResNet+SE (1→16→32→64→128) + ClinicalEncoder MLP(5→64→128). Gated fusion: gate=sigmoid(Linear(128,1)) applied to MRI feat, concat(gated_mri, clinical)→Linear(256,5). 150 epochs each, ensemble=2. CosineAnnealingLR T_max=150. DROPOUT=0.5. WD=0.05. H+V flip. Standard CE. TTA=8 passes. LR=5e-4. Clinical z-score normalization (5 features).

MRI+Clinical fusion: ResNet+SE (1→16→32→64→128) + FiLM conditioning at each stage. Clinical MLP(5→32) → FiLM(γ,β) applied after each ResBlock. Concat(mri,clinical)→Linear(256,5). 150 epochs each, ensemble=2. CosineAnnealingLR T_max=150. DROPOUT=0.5. WD=0.05. H+V flip. Standard CE. TTA=8 passes. LR=5e-4. Clinical z-score normalization (5 features).

MRI+Clinical fusion: ResNet+SE (1→16→32→64→128) + FiLM conditioning at each stage. Clinical MLP(5→32) → FiLM(γ,β) applied after each ResBlock. Concat(mri,clinical)→Linear(256,5). 150 epochs each, ensemble=2. CosineAnnealingLR T_max=150. DROPOUT=0.5. WD=0.05. H+V flip. Standard CE. TTA=8 passes. LR=5e-4. Clinical z-score normalization (5 features).

MRI+Clinical fusion: ResNet+SE (1→16→32→64→128) + FiLM conditioning at each stage. Clinical MLP(5→32) → FiLM(γ,β) applied after each ResBlock. Concat(mri,clinical)→Linear(256,5). 150 epochs each, ensemble=2. CosineAnnealingLR T_max=150. DROPOUT=0.5. WD=0.05. H+V flip. Standard CE. TTA=8 passes. LR=5e-4. Clinical z-score normalization (5 features).
